message:
Show hover window next to stamp, not on top

Positioning the real window on top of the stamp blocked the stamp's
click-to-restore handler. Now tries: left of stamp, right, above,
below — with a 4px gap. The stamp stays visible and clickable for
restore/un-minimize while the real window is interactive next to it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
